Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Continued To Feb-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitions For 1) Interpretation Of Will And Determination Of Entitlement And 2) Authority To Borrow Money And Execute Deed Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Suttle for Executor.

The Court stated that it has no problem with the portion of the petition that request interpretation of the will, that it seems the natural way to read the document and that there is no objection. The court also stated that it has no problem with the loan but questioned the request for a deed of trust. Mr. Suttle stated that the deed of trust was to secure the loan and that they included it because they were not sure if the first request would be granted. The Court spoke of the difficulties/conflict a deed of trust may create down the road. Mr. Suttle is to submit one revised order addressing all requests and reflecting the above (deed of trust not granted).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
